scenarios.title: Chat Client
scenarios.description: Enumerates all the Chat service instances that are known to Windows and connects to the selected one.

controls.inner_text: Enumerates all the Chat service instances that are known to Windows and connects to the selected one.
Once a client is connected to the Bluetooth Rfcomm server, write the message you want to transmit to the client and click "Send".
